bead.title: Phase 0: cross-repo consumer audit (HELIX, Dun, others) for ddx-agent internal imports + spec references
bead.description:
Before any spec deletes or code migrations, audit consumers outside DDx for entanglement with DDx internals or the agent boundary docs that are about to be deleted/trimmed.

Greps to run (across ~/Projects/{helix,dun} if those exist):
- grep -rn "DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/cli/internal/agent" — Go imports of DDx internals
- grep -rn "SD-015\|SD-023\|CONTRACT-002\|plan-2026-04-08-agent-routing" — doc cross-references

Already known: ~/Projects/helix/docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-001-audit.md:27 references DDx internal agent behavior. That references will need migration or deletion alongside this epic.

For each non-zero hit: file a separate migration bead naming the consumer, the symbol/doc, and the proposed remediation (migrate to Service interface call OR delete the reference). Those beads block Phase 1 (spec deletes).
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] HELIX repo grepped; results documented in this bead notes
- [ ] Dun repo grepped (if it exists); same
- [ ] Each non-zero hit has a migration bead filed and linked to this audit
- [ ] Audit covers both Go imports AND doc references
